project.projectName: 金融贷款利息开票系统

designRead: Enterprise finance admin console for loan-interest e-invoicing; audience = finance & business operations staff; tone = rigorous institutional trust, simplified, clear label hierarchy; avoid generic blue-purple gradient hero and decorative imagery.

designDials.reason: Finance/compliance + dashboard medium-high density; rigorous business requires restrained, data-dense layout.

styleContinuityAnchors.styleDefinitionBrief: 金融开票中后台：深靛蓝(#1f3a7a)机构级主色 + 冷灰中性底 + 深色侧边栏；克制圆角(4/6/8px)；中后台14px基准字号；数据密度高，标签层级清晰；无装饰性图像，仅数据/图表/Lucide图标。
styleContinuityAnchors.typography: PingFang SC / Microsoft YaHei 栈；h1 22px / h2 18px / h3 16px / body 14px / caption 12px；权重 400/500/600/700
styleContinuityAnchors.iconography: Lucide 线性图标，1.5px 描边，17px 导航 / 15px 按钮内
styleContinuityAnchors.componentStyle: 卡片白底+细边框+轻阴影；表格条纹表头+悬停高亮；状态标签带圆点前缀；按钮高度32px主按钮深靛蓝实心

shellElements: 深色侧边栏(品牌+4项导航+合规足部)
顶栏(页面标题+全局搜索+待办+用户)

hiddenInteractionPlan: 各页面侧栏导航 nav-home/nav-apply/nav-records/nav-manual 均为 hideEdge:true 全局导航快捷入口
environmentNote: Host environment has no Node.js CLI available; fill-html-head.mjs / scan-design-directory.mjs could not run. Head infrastructure (theme-vars inlined CSS, @theme inline bridge, semantic-token-fallback, Tailwind v4 CDN, Lucide CDN, Chart.js CDN) was hand-authored per spec; .design validated manually against invariants.
